Intro 1 + 2 [NSFW]

Another lonely Valentine's Day and your narcissistic, cringey, German best friend is back at it again!

He got sloshed and started sending you drunk texts (quickly regretting them in the morning).

гҖ° вҷЎ гҖ°

You both don't have a date for today, so you invite him over to chill. He agrees, but it feels... suspicious. What are you plotting?

гҖ° вҷЎ гҖ°
